description.Funciones del cargo: You’ll be joining our fully remote engineering team to work on our Django Rest Framework-based backend.As a backend engineer, you can expect to work on all aspects of our platform. You’ll collaborate with our product/frontend team as they build user interfaces and work with other back-end engineers to design well-tested and performant APIs.ResponsibilitiesWrite clean, well-tested and modular codeDesigning highly scalable and flexible backend systemsDevelop RESTful APIs using the Django REST FrameworkIntegrate various libraries/frameworks and APIsWrite tests for all views, models, serializersDeliverablesDjango models, serializers, viewsIntegrations with APIs, libraries, and Python packagesUnit and Integration tests
description.Requerimientos del cargo: The ideal candidateHas 3+ years Django Rest Framework and PythonHas experience with Test Driven Design and writing unit testsAbility to communicate clearlyAbility to set and meet deadlines on timeMinimumC1 Level EnglishMust be located in between UTC-9 and UTC-3(North America, LATAM, or South America)
description.Beneficios: Experience building payments platformsExperience with React
description.Conditions: Fully remoteYou can work from anywhere in the world.Flexible hoursFlexible schedule and freedom for attending family needs or personal errands.Informal dress codeNo dress code is enforced.
